## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance data and align on content and web development priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Branded Search Down \~50%:** A mid-August drop in branded search clicks is linked to a pullback in awareness marketing (e.g., YouTube ads) and a strategic shift to target professional users, which reduced the total addressable market.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Content Traffic Spiking:** Overall content traffic is up, but a large portion is untracked "direct" traffic, suggesting bot activity. GrowthX will investigate user behavior via PostHog to differentiate real engagement from noise.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**New Web Dev Process:** To prevent site-wide issues (like a recent table formatting bug), all global web changes now require review and approval from Megan or Sylvain before deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**CTA Experiment Inconclusive:** The current CTA experiment is statistically insignificant after 15k views, with the control group slightly ahead. It will run until EOY to gather more data before a decision is made.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Branded Search Drop

  - [**Problem:** Branded search clicks dropped \~50% since mid-August, impacting the homepage and pricing page.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Analysis:** This timeline aligns with two strategic shifts:](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Reduced Awareness Marketing:** A pullback in YouTube ads and other awareness campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Pricing Change:** A strategic focus on professional users, which reduced the total addressable market.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** These factors compounded, leading to fewer searches from the "scrappy developer" segment.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Context:** The broader market shows signs of "AI fatigue," with competitors like Cursor and Warp also seeing search trends decline (per Google Trends/Ahrefs).](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**Organic Traffic Spike:** A large traffic spike is occurring across several articles.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Concern:** A significant portion is untracked "direct" traffic, raising suspicion of bot activity.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will use PostHog to analyze user behavior (e.g., region, session recordings) and differentiate real engagement from noise.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Conversion Gap:** High-traffic articles are not converting visitors effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX is rewriting top-performing articles to improve quality and conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Content Production:** The team is publishing \~15 content refreshes per week.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**Action:** Liz will conduct weekly audits to map traffic spikes to specific refreshes and double down on successful formats.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### Web Development & Process

  - [**New Review Process:** To prevent site-wide issues like a recent table formatting bug caused by a global change in Sanity, a new process is in place:](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Default:** Per-page overrides are the standard for all changes.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [**Global Changes:** Any unavoidable global changes require review and approval from Megan or Sylvain.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Content Quality Improvements:** Recent PRs include new components to improve SEO and user experience:](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [TLDR component](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Optimized code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [FAQ module](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Team & Priorities

  - [**Team Structure:** GrowthX is moving to a "pool model" with specialized experts (e.g., Ed, Talal) to ensure the right person works on each task.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Top Priorities (P0):**](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
    1.  [**Grow Traffic:** Improve content quality and layouts.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
    2.  [**Improve Conversion:** Optimize the site to convert the new traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Data Integrity:** Sylvain's team will conduct a full audit and cleanup of conversion events in PostHog between now and January to ensure reliable data for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Provide a one-page summary of the branded search drop for Sylvain's internal presentation. (Due: Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Provide a one-page post-mortem on the "code review" launch (SEO performance, traffic, etc.) for Sylvain's internal presentation. (Due: Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Continue the CTA experiment until EOY to gather more data.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [Investigate the organic traffic spike via PostHog to differentiate real users from bots.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [Follow up with Jason Gong on Friday regarding the "COVID relaunch" project.](https://fathom.video/share/4zpRWGhd7eMBd3Eq-cMDmnKp1t7VTmDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
